AATS" Subskills of the Arts Skill can include any area of artistic expression, from music t0 painting to sculpture Note that the subskills suggested below are broader categories than most characters would have but they are intended t0 show the range possibilities For example character would probably have the Art/Trumpet Skill rather than the ArtyMusic Performance Skill: Sample Art Subskills: Architecture Dance Music Composition_ Music Performance Illustration, Sculpture_ Writing: Painting; Theater, Choreography; Poetry; Weaving
also easier t0 Iearn For clarity: use the term you when referring to your character and your opponent" when referring to the other character in the melee For each skill bonus point in Brawling the character may choose learn one ofthe following maneuvers See also Special Maneuvers_ P 114- Bear Hug: successful, your opponent is pinned and can: not make melee attack in the following turn_ At the end of the turn in which character was pinned an Opposed Strength Check iS made_ If the target character iS successful_ he has bro ken your grip and may make an attack normally the following turn. If the target is unsuccessful, he remains pinned Eye Gouge (Attack): +5 TN, but if it inflicts any Fatigue_ your opponent has Target Number to all attacks for the next 106 turns Note this maneuver cannot be used against target whose eyes are covered by goggles Or full helmet: Haymaker (Attack): By taking Fatigue you may add 206 damage,
BLADES The Blades Skill covers the use of all one-handed melee weapons that are not jointed or flexible (in which case the Whips Skill iS used_ 108). whether those weapons are actually blad: ed (sword vibroaxe) or not (club stunstick) 
BOMBING This skill is used for dropping things accurately from air: craft of all types. Most often used t0 drop bombs it iS also used Dy crop dusters ad in BattleMech combat drops
BUREAUCRACY" character with Bureaucracy Skill trained operate within the framework of power structure such as civilian or mil itary administrations successful Bureaucracy Check allows the character t0 locate the person most useful to him in any given office or chain of command Bureaucracy regional skill 951. the   subskills for which   are based on geographical regions or particular groups such as mercenaries_
BRAWLING This is the unrefined art of smashing your fist into another person in the effort to knock him out or kill him: It is not as effective as Martial Arts (p. 102), but on the other hand it iS
